flows: accesso app -> 1° accesso — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="first access";
accesso app -> 1° accesso — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="not first access";
1° accesso -> utente già registrato? — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user already registered?";
1° accesso -> utente già registrato? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user not registered";
utente già registrato? — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user is registered";
utente già registrato? — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user is not registered";
utente già registrato? -> registrazione — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user not registered";
utente già registrato? -> login — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user is registered";
registrazione -> home — type=transition; label="registrazione completata"; explanation="registration successful";
login -> home — type=transition; label="login effettuato"; explanation="login successful";
home -> start — type=transition; label="ritorna all'app"; explanation="return to app";
the diagram models the initial access flow to an application.
if the user has not accessed the app before, they are prompted to register or log in.
if the user is registered, they are directed to the home screen.
if the user is not registered, they are directed to the registration process.
if the user is not already registered, they are directed to the registration process.
home -> tragitto in corso — transition="yes"; explanation="user wants to start a trip"
home -> vuoi cambiare sezione? — transition="no"; explanation="user does not want to change section"
tragitto in corso -> tragitto terminato — transition="yes"; explanation="trip is completed"
tragitto terminato -> calcolo emissioni — transition="yes"; explanation="after trip completion, calculate emissions"
vuoi cambiare sezione? -> menu orizzontale — transition="yes"; explanation="user wants to change section"
vuoi cambiare sezione? -> home — transition="no"; explanation="user does not want to change section"
the diagram models a state machine representing the flow of a trip calculation process.
the process starts at the home state.
the user can either start a trip or change a section.
if a trip is in progress, it can be completed, leading to emission calculation.
if the user doesn't want to change the section, the process returns to the home state.
statistiche -> visualizza report settimanale? — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if yes"
statistiche -> vuoi cambiare sezione? — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if yes"
statistiche -> statistiche — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if no"
visualizza report settimanale? -> report settimanale — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if yes"
vuoi cambiare sezione? -> menu orizzontale — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if yes"
statistiche
statistiche -> visualizza report settimanale? (si) -> report settimanale
report settimanale
the diagram models a simple state machine representing the interaction flow for accessing statistics.
the system starts at the 'statistiche' state.
the user can either view a weekly report or change the section.
if the user wants to view the report, the system transitions to the 'report settimanale' state.
if the user doesn't want to view the report, the system checks if they want to change the section.
if the user wants to change the section, the system transitions to the 'menu orizzontale' state.
if the user doesn't want to change the section, the system returns to the 'statistiche' state.
visualizza dati personali -> profilo — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user wants to view personal data"
visualizza dati personali -> profilo — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user does not want to view personal data"
vuoi aggiornare l'account? -> profilo — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user wants to update account"
vuoi aggiornare l'account? -> profilo — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user does not want to update account"
vuoi uscire dall'account? -> logout — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user wants to logout"
vuoi uscire dall'account? -> profilo — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user does not want to logout"
vuoi cambiare sezione? -> menu orrizontale — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user wants to change section"
vuoi cambiare sezione? -> profilo — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user does not want to change section"
inserisci nuovi dati -> aggiorna dati — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="user inserts new data"
inserisci nuovi dati -> profilo — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="user does not insert new data"
aggiorna dati -> profilo — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="data updated"
aggiorna dati -> profilo — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="data not updated"
the diagram models the user's interaction with a profile section of an application.
the user can choose to view personal data, update their account, logout, or change sections.
the diagram shows a flow where the user first decides whether to view data, update their account, logout, or change sections.
each decision leads to a specific action or returns to the main profile view.
utente -> applicazione: inserire credenziali;
applicazione -> server: invio credenziali;
server -> database: verifica dati;
server -> applicazione: dati trovati;
applicazione -> server: confronto con quelli inseriti;
applicazione -> utente: login avvenuto;
utente -> applicazione: inserire credenziali
applicazione -> server: invio credenziali
server -> database: verifica dati
database -> server: dati trovati
server -> applicazione: dati trovati
applicazione -> server: confronto con quelli inseriti
applicazione -> utente: login avvenuto
the diagram models the login sequence between an user, an application, a server, and a database.
the user initiates the login process by providing credentials to the application.
the application then sends these credentials to the server for verification.
the server queries the database to check if the provided credentials are valid.
if the credentials are valid, the server sends a confirmation message back to the application, which then informs the user that the login has been successful.
utente -> applicazione: avvio percorso;
applicazione -> server: calcolo e invio dati;
server -> database: aggiunta percorso;
server -> database: nuovo percorso;
server -> applicazione: ritorno emissioni;
applicazione -> server: emissioni co2;
utente -> applicazione: avvio percorso
applicazione -> server: calcolo e invio dati
server -> database: aggiunta percorso
server -> database: nuovo percorso
server -> applicazione: ritorno emissioni
applicazione -> server: emissioni co2
the diagram models the sequence of events involved in calculating co2 emissions based on a user-provided route.
the user initiates the process, the application calculates the emissions, the server interacts with the database to store the route, and finally, the application receives the emission data.

no -> registrazione

pages.uml_type:
State_machine
- HOME — kind=state; attributes=; operations=; role=Starting Point
- Tragitto in corso — kind=state; attributes=; operations=; role=In Progress
- Tragitto terminato — kind=state; attributes=; operations=; role=Completed
- Calcolo emissioni — kind=state; attributes=; operations=; role=Calculation
- Vuoi cambiare sezione? — kind=decision; attributes=; operations=; role=Decision Point
- Menu orizzontale — kind=state; attributes=; operations=; role=Menu
flows: home -> tragitto in corso — transition="yes"; explanation="user wants to start a trip"
home -> vuoi cambiare sezione? — transition="no"; explanation="user does not want to change section"
tragitto in corso -> tragitto terminato — transition="yes"; explanation="trip is completed"
tragitto terminato -> calcolo emissioni — transition="yes"; explanation="after trip completion, calculate emissions"
vuoi cambiare sezione? -> menu orizzontale — transition="yes"; explanation="user wants to change section"
vuoi cambiare sezione? -> home — transition="no"; explanation="user does not want to change section"
the diagram models a state machine representing the flow of a trip calculation process.
the process starts at the home state.
the user can either start a trip or change a section.
if a trip is in progress, it can be completed, leading to emission calculation.
if the user doesn't want to change the section, the process returns to the home state.
validations: vuoi cambiare sezione? — branch="yes" -> menu orizzontale, branch="no" -> home
